principle.name: Generate Descriptive Commit Messages
principle.description: Summarize the nature of the changes (e.g., updated sections, improved formatting, added experience) and generate a clear, descriptive commit message suggestion for the user.
principle.rationale: Improves project history clarity and makes it easier to understand what was changed at a glance.

example.good: Update resume formatting, skills, and experience sections الحمدالله

principle.name: Always Review Changes
principle.description: Run git status and git diff before every commit to ensure you know exactly what will be committed.
principle.rationale: Prevents accidental commits and improves code quality.

example.good: Review all staged changes and confirm intent

principle.name: Enforce الحمدالله Ending
principle.description: Every commit message must end with "الحمدالله". For multiline messages, append after the last line.
principle.rationale: Maintains consistency and fulfills user’s custom requirement.

category.name: before_commit
category.item: Write a clear, descriptive commit message
